## Today's Best Options Trades

**Best CSP:** PLTR $125 put, 2026-06-18, 40 DTE, $3.90/$4.00, Δ0.27, 28.8% annualized

**Best Position Income CC:** GOOGL $420 call, 2026-06-18, 40 DTE, $8.70/$9.00, Δ0.33, 20.3% annualized

**LEAPS:** All major names (AAPL, AMZN, NVDA) extended >8% above MA50 with high IVP - waiting for pullbacks

**IVP Environment:** Mixed volatility - PLTR (59%) and MSFT (91%) offering premium, but most quality names expensive or extended above key moving averages.
